examples: Ludo is a version of an ancient Indian racing game.
“We're just faster, ” says Ludo Oelrich, the director of TNT's “Moving the World” programme.
"And now," roared Ludo Bagman's voice, "kindly put your wands in the air... For the Irish National Team Mascots!"
Some popular pop-ups include LudoBites, the Los Angeles pop-up restaurant run by Krissy Lefebvre and husband Ludo Lefebvre.
